issues.issue: Missing multi-tenancy check on issue retrieval.
issues.fix: Join with PayrollReconciliation and filter by organization_id to prevent cross-tenant data leakage.

issues.issue: Missing multi-tenancy check on issue resolution.
issues.fix: Ensure the query filters by organization_id to prevent users from resolving issues in other organizations.

issues.issue: Advanced listing features (sorting, search) are missing.
issues.fix: Add support for sorting parameters (e.g., sort_by, order) and search functionality for reconciliation numbers.

improvement_hints_for_agent: Always verify that every database query involving a resource includes an organization_id filter, even when joining tables.
Implement a standard sorting and filtering utility for list endpoints to improve API usability.
Ensure that the 'current_user' organization context is applied to every single database operation, not just the primary resource.
